decision.archive_summary: Previous implementation/debugging cycle was completed and treated as done. Durable context to preserve as pins: minor-GC logic was adjusted so guarded relation handling includes `continue`; a harder Chinese multitopic regression case was added; the solution should avoid whitelist-style hardcoding and packaged guard must not override shadow-guard vetoes; `continue` should reject activation if any kept turn is downgraded to pin-only; `summary-first` should not be forced when raw-keep is lighter; the assistant reported the automated live eval was rerun and ended green. The new active phase is a fresh round of testing to assess perceived behavior changes.
